textByHash.05da55db135a63f0bc0472c2eee438a47dc8e8e0: If what you've told me is true, you were fooled just as we were. But I suppose that means little now. With the prison now open again, there isn't much to prevent the evil escaping once more.
textByHash.08ca45391191ab25b05ddfef7cad869542379599: Don't be. This is the punishment for my sins.
textByHash.134412f60e491cb4a6f2d94be195d0c1ab95cc44: We abandoned the cause of Saradomin and became followers of Guthix. Our new leader taught us the ways of the druids, including an ancient ritual that had the power to awaken Guthix himself.
textByHash.14ca14431705448070df785092eccc90c505d0a4: You will never be able to truly defeat her. The best you can do is to try and keep her contained. When you are ready to face her, just go through the barrier.
textByHash.19c21369cd3fe002065c624cc7c950571b84f0f2: As for me, I was one of the first to fall after Nex was freed, but I didn't truly die. Something about our ritual tied me to this place. I've been trapped here ever since. Not dead, but not really alive either.
textByHash.29362be524957dd7d5dd0eb1685145fa5a117f61: This place has remained vulnerable ever since.
textByHash.33e3b7b2cb03ee62cb8e4344663baf797ed23c9f: Treasure? I fear you have been misled. There is no treasure here, only our great mistake.
textByHash.346e5462d40f6cb077492980344b7dcced44d2b4: There is only one thing you can do. You can fight.
textByHash.36567b652cb941c9f0c67eb25d8a4baa34341b71: We thought we were doing good, but we were led astray. We opened the prison, and unleashed the horror within.
textByHash.3895d9d6d50561b962f13e72bfe453c8d673d2cb: Forgive me, but this conversation has brought back many memories. Let us speak no more of this.
textByHash.3afc5857ca8681b6b2146aa4fdca4aa92a1570b3: The rest is as I already told you. Nex posed such a danger, that the four armies temorarily joined forces to drive her back into the prison. They resealed it, but were unable to fix the enchantments we destroyed.
textByHash.3f9199a1817f0b8918152f123ffd438c4711ce92: Long ago, these lands were dominated by a great empire, ruled over by an ancient god. The Empty Lord is what they often called him, but his true name was Zaros.
textByHash.4034f5b1ec31ae88c15d4c3a780c998ca0b573ff: If it helps, while my magic is limited here, I should still be able to transfer items in and out of the prison for you. Let me know if you'd like me to do this before you enter.
textByHash.47e9ac2135e984b46ba8c5100ef0da9538c865c4: The rest is as I already told you. Nex posed such a danger, that the four armies temporarily joined forces to drive her back into the prison. They resealed it, but were unable to fix the enchantments we destroyed.
textByHash.69057c5549821c79e8342e5eb9272b3bfe539bb5: Although their god was gone, many Zarosians fought to keep his empire alive. Among them was Nex. She was Zaros' most powerful weapon, and she led a great army to try and restore his empire.
textByHash.756f5fff3b3bf6f13cd7bf2ac431d7de80129c38: By then, many of us had grown tired of war. One of our priests discovered this. He came to us and revealed that he felt the same way, and that he had secretly converted to Guthix. He encouraged us to join him.
textByHash.9615471e71cf7555721c894241c5b1ebaa9e1671: It seemed that way. I heard little of what they said, but I did hear what she called him.
textByHash.9996b73d4e883a3a1052f93812282da94fce7db8: Nex's followers are capable of bringing down even the strongest of warriors. I did fear you might not make it past them.
textByHash.9b7ae6d05dac3f876c9df42dba073959b11e133e: After great effort and sacrifice, they managed to place Nex and her followers into a frozen, enchanted sleep.
textByHash.b74f7dfca91b307e4f72414b85de9740186c6494: He never gave us his true name, but as Nex was freed, she spoke to him.
textByHash.bb51f32bea1e2266ecedc83c1a31ff392541b18c: She is a being of darkness. A servant of the Ruinous Powers. She is the Angel of Death. She is Nex.
textByHash.bebbaf463fcf8476b9a6740c739c19d6907055cf: I can't let you go in there.
textByHash.c679410a14d0e235e4b410962b2ec91741186c87: I'm... Ashuelot... Ashuelot Reis. But I don't understand... How are you here?
textByHash.c98bcb0c3d53de21f4f1203626ccd290d0787fe4: Yes... After our great mistake, four opposing armies united to contain the evil again. They managed to reseal the prison, but they were unable to repair the original enchantments.
textByHash.d1550d1c8c1947f6a8f91d4ef712bbdb4455b10f: Once Nex was no longer an immediate threat, they built the Temple of Lost Ancients around her. Most of the temple has since fallen to ruin, but you can still see some of the remains.
textByHash.d709a18058738c97f0e2eb1c0b329e4653eb4f55: We believed this ritual to be the only way to end the war.
textByHash.d8a921cc2c1df558543bdf875d0fd464847b2ae5: It was. He had never been a follower of Guthix, or Saradomin. His real goal had always been to free Nex.
textByHash.e06adc2ee8373ea4c16c9cb179a058995107b920: At the height of his power, Zaros seemed untouchable, but he was eventually defeated by those he trusted the most. With him gone, the empire collapsed. War broke out soon after.
textByHash.e397b6feaad8720d5544c35dff0546dd78e8563e: Yes. Later in the war, a great battle broke out in the Temple of Lost Ancients. I was a Saradominist soldier at the time, and I was among those who fought for him in that battle.
textByHash.e42a28ea148b35304f414948b589d330395f1d90: The forces of Saradomin knew that Nex needed to be dealt with. They were able to lure her into these caverns.
textByHash.e7820e8312060adf2a1f35e592b7465b8bae31c8: Still, they are nothing compared to the Angel of Death herself.
textByHash.e9d39b23a3529fa0c543c5648b1d38cb60432b7e: I hope so. Nex can be found in the inner section of the prison. Join me there. But be warned, Nex was not imprisoned alone. You'll need to fight through her followers to reach her.
textByHash.ec6c937c2592ccbfad515fdecba142d05685c296: No... When our leader led us to perform the ritual, it was not Guthix we woke, but Nex and her forces. The ritual also destroyed the protective enchantments on their prison.
textByHash.f174d9b3fabd053fbd79c94687b7b9ab26482e52: This place is a prison. Here, a being of incomprehensible power was sealed away. Things would have stayed that way, if not for our foolishness.
textByHash.f2fe30fdbeb3cf810626c7ad7e381f346c4f204c: Not that she needed an army of course. Nex alone was powerful enough to hold back hundreds of lesser beings.
textByHash.fd87e73ada79c075b31390c5ef2a16934be156f6: He'd achieved his goal, so he left. I never saw him again.
